calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Goal-seeding pipeline diagnostic: drive_floor x transient patches (post EXQ-588 autopsy)
items.note: Diagnostic (claim_ids=[]). 3 arms: ARM_OFF (floor=0, no patch), ARM_FLOOR (0.9, no patch), ARM_FLOOR_PATCH (0.9 + transient benefit 3.0). Persistent agent, 300 ep x 200 steps, post-warmup=ep50. A1 OFF zero seedings; A2 floor >=2/3 seeds seeding; A3 floor+patch >=2/3; A4 patch contacts >1.1x floor. Routes failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-588. Smoke PASS; validate_experiments OK.

items.title: EXQ-ISEF-004: novelty bonus Goldilocks calibration -- MECH-111 broadcast weight sweep (infant_substrate:GAP-13)
items.note: infant_substrate:GAP-13 closure. Sweeps novelty_bonus_weight in [0.1, 0.3, 0.5, 0.7, 1.0]. C1: signal active (mean_novelty_ema > 0.001 in >=2/3 seeds for any arm). C2: >=3/5 arms with mean_coverage > 0.05 in >=2/3 seeds. Goldilocks weight = arm with highest (norm_coverage + norm_H_pos) / 2. PASS unblocks infant curriculum Phase 1 weight adoption. Smoke PASS.

items.title: EXQ-ISEF-005: 4-phase infant curriculum vs flat parameter baselines (GAP-14)
items.note: infant_substrate:GAP-14 closure. PASS confirms ARC-046 (phased residue accumulation via curriculum); unblocks DEV-NEED-008.

items.title: GAP-11 pilot: committed-mode curriculum harness validation (EXP-0157)
items.note: commitment_closure:GAP-11 diagnostic pilot. 3 arms: EMERGENT (P0 warmup on easy env -> P2 eval on target), FORCED_RV (clone + forced rv=0.001 -> P2), STARVED (tight threshold=1e-4 -> abort gate fires at mid-probe). C1: emergent committed steps/ep>100 in >=2/3 seeds. C2: forced-rv committed steps/ep>100 all seeds. C3: starved arm aborts (abort_reason=commitment_not_elicited) all seeds. PASS unblocks V3-EXQ-460b/463b/464b/466b/467b/468b OCD battery. Supersedes V3-EXQ-461 (synthetic scripted diagnostic, 2026-05-12).
